nasb.text: Then afterward he read all the words of the law, the blessing and the curse, according to all that is written in the book of the law.

esv.text: And afterward he read all the words of the law, the blessing and the curse, according to all that is written in the Book of the Law.

cnv.text: 然後，約書亞宣讀律法上一切祝福和咒詛的話，全都照著律法書上所寫的一切。

ccb.text: 随后，约书亚向民众宣读记在摩西律法书上的一切祝福和咒诅。
